name: FloatingIndicator
visual_summary: A circular loading indicator that floats at the top right of the page. This component would be used to visually depict a loading or in progress state. It can be easily customized with different styles and themes.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready loader component with the following characteristics:

Name: FloatingIndicator
Description: A circular loading indicator that floats at the top right of the page. This component would be used to visually depict a loading or in progress state. It can be easily customized with different styles and themes.
Style: circle, float, loading
Interactions: animated, clickable
Tags: button, loader, indication

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
Reference implementation (adapt don't copy):

import type {
  FloatingIndicatorCssVariables,
  FloatingIndicatorFactory,
  FloatingIndicatorProps,
  FloatingIndicatorStylesNames,
} from './FloatingIndicator';

export { FloatingIndicator } from './FloatingIndicator';

export type {
  FloatingIndicatorProps,
  FloatingIndicatorStylesNames,
  FloatingIndicatorCssVariables,
  FloatingIndicatorFactory,
};
